reviews.comment:
Un desastre como atienden en el Shop.  Lo chicos en la playa una 10.
Si claro a las 21.45hs quiero comprar algo en el Shop y prácticamente me echo diciendo que ya limpio el piso

(Translated by Google)
The service at the shop is a disaster. The guys on the beach are great, though. Of course, at 9:45 pm I want to buy something at the shop and they practically kick me out, saying they've already cleaned the floor.
